name: Game Plan Golf Performance
address: 1621 S Rancho Santa Fe Rd Ste. H, San Marcos, CA 92078
about: Game Plan Golf Performance is a golf training and practice facility that specializes in high-performance instruction and data-driven swing analysis. The studio utilizes state-of-the-art technology, including the RoboGolfPro swing-training robot, GC Quad launch monitors, and Swing Catalyst 3D force plates, to provide personalized coaching experiences. Training sessions are conducted by appointment only in a fully staffed environment, with a focus on building custom improvement plans based on individual swing mechanics, body mobility, and athletic goals. The facility also offers various membership options for access to simulators for practice, along with public hourly rentals for individuals not seeking a membership.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to the RoboGolfPro for guided, perfect swing repetitions to accelerate improvement
Data-driven analysis using launch monitors and force plates to connect swing feel to fact
Personalized training plans tailored to individual body mechanics and mobility

food_and_drink.notes: No alcohol service mentioned; BYOB status not specified

simulator_hardware.notes: High-speed photometric launch monitor used for swing analysis
Ground pressure and force measurement system for swing analysis

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, golfers are expected to bring their own clubs for practice and lessons. The facility does not mention club rentals.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The website does not mention a policy on outside food or drinks. No on-site food or drink service is mentioned.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulator game take?
faq.answer: The website does not specify a time for an 18-hole simulator session. Standard practice sessions are booked by the hour.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers junior rates and programs for youth golfers, indicating it is kid-friendly.
